law: You can’t use automatic code signing for this sample app.

You must create an explicit App ID and provisioning profile, and your provisioning profile must contain the following set of entitlements: Request these entitlements from Apple, and use them to configure a provisioning profile for the sample.
You must also disable SIP to skip the notarization checks that normally occur when installing DriverKit extensions.
You can also use that tool to uninstall your extension or reset the state of your system extensions.
Because it is a local method, the sample doesn’t use the macro to call it.
